displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 6
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Crimson Empire #0-6, Star Wars Bounty Hunters – Kenix Kil, Star Wars: Crimson Empire II – Council of Blood #1-6, Star Wars: Crimson Empire III – Empire Lost #1-6, and material from Dark Horse Extra #21-24 and Dark Horse Presents (2011) #1
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 6
